name: Single Strike Urshifu
flavor: This form of Urshifu is a strong believer in the one-hit KO. Its strategy is to leap in close to foes and land a devastating blow with a hardened fist.

ability.name: Double Type
ability.effect: As long as this Pokémon is in play, it is [F] and [D] type.

attacks.name: Power Blast
attacks.effect: Discard a [D] Energy from this Pokémon.
